briefdescription.para: Pause DMA transaction at next idle stage on memory bus.
Return all registers to default state and FSMs to IDLE.
Start or continue processing of descriptor list 0.
Start or continue processing of descriptor list 1.
Start or continue processing of descriptor list 2.
Start or continue processing of descriptor list 3.
Start or continue processing of descriptor list 4.
Start or continue processing of descriptor list 5.
Start or continue processing of descriptor list 6.
Start or continue processing of descriptor list 7.
MVDMA tasks.
Sink data descriptor list has been completed.
Data descriptor list processing has been started.
Data transfer has been paused.
MVDMA has been reset.
Bus error has been received on the source channel.
Job on the source channel with event enable attribute bit active has been processed.
Bus error has been received on the sink channel.
Job on the sink channel with event enable attribute bit active has been processed.
Job 0 is completed.
Job 1 is completed.
Job 2 is completed.
Job 3 is completed.
MVDMA events.
Interrupt on END event.
Interrupt on STARTED event.
Interrupt on PAUSED event.
Interrupt on RESET event.
Interrupt on SOURCEBUSERROR event.
Interrupt on SINKBUSERROR event.
Interrupt on SOURCESELECTJOBDONE event.
Interrupt on SINKSELECTJOBDONE event.
Interrupt on COMPLETED0 event.
Interrupt on COMPLETED1 event.
Interrupt on COMPLETED2 event.
Interrupt on COMPLETED3 event.
MVDMA interrupts.
Descriptor list pointers are stored in SOURCELISTPTR and SINKLISTPTR registers.
Descriptor list pointers are stored in a list in the memory.
MVDMA modes of operation.
AXI burst transactions may be longer than one beat.
All AXI transactions are one-beat accesses.
MVDMA AXI modes.
No data in intermediate FIFO.
Intermediate FIFO contains data.
Intermediate FIFO is full.
MVDMA FIFO status.
No error.
Error related to memory when reading joblist or memory/register when reading data.
Error related to the joblist address or address when reading memory/register.
MVDMA data source errors.
No error.
Error related to memory when reading joblist.
Error related to memory/register when writing data.
Error related to the joblist address when reading joblist.
Error related to the memory/register address when writing data.
MVDMA data sink errors.
Function for activating the specified MVDMA task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified MVDMA task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Specified task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting START task by its index.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of the START task.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified MVDMA event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the MVDMA event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified MVDMA event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Specified event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_mvdma_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_mvdma_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_mvdma_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.

simplesect.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_mvdma_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given MVDMA task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given MVDMA task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given MVDMA task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a given MVDMA event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given MVDMA event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given MVDMA event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the MVDMA mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Desired operating mode for MVDMA.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the AXI mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Desired AXI mode for MVDMA.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the pointer to the source descriptor list or pointer to the list of descriptor list pointers, depending on configured nrf_mvdma_mode_t mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to a job list.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the pointer to the source descriptor list or pointer to the list of descriptor list pointers, depending on configured nrf_mvdma_mode_t mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the pointer to the sink descriptor list or pointer to the list of descriptor list pointers, depending on configured nrf_mvdma_mode_t mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to a job list.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the pointer to the sink descriptor list or pointer to the list of descriptor list pointers, depending on configured nrf_mvdma_mode_t mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the result of CRC checksum calculation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the status of intermediate FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking the MVDMA activity.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
MVDMA is processing data.
MVDMA is idle.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the bus error of MVDMA data source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the bus error of MVDMA data source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the latest address being accessed on the source AXI channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Latest address being accessed on the source AXI channel.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the latest address being accessed on the sink AXI channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Latest address being accessed on the sink AXI channel.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the number of completed jobs in the current source descriptor list.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Number of completed jobs in the current source descriptor list.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the number of completed jobs in the current sink descriptor list.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Number of completed jobs in the current sink descriptor list.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether AXIMODE configuration is present.
Macro for checking if multi-mode operation is available.
Hardware access layer for managing the Memory-to-Memory Vector DMA (MVDMA) peripheral.
